configurations.name: Run Backend
configurations.__comment: Launches the Go backend directly. Use when you want the debugger to start the process. Alternatively, run `go run ./cmd/daedalus/` in a terminal and use the 'Attach to Backend (Delve)' config.

configurations.name: Attach to Backend (Delve)
configurations.__comment: Attaches Delve to an already-running backend. Start the backend with: dlv debug ./cmd/daedalus/ --listen=:40000 --headless --api-version=2

configurations.name: Debug Frontend (Chrome)
configurations.__comment: Attaches Chrome DevTools debugger to Vite dev server. Requires Vite running on :5173. Breakpoints work in frontend/src/ TypeScript and JavaScript files.
